name: Denethix Watchguard
reasoning: V3 is the strongest choice. It has clean anatomy with no visible AI artifacts, excellent prompt adherence (soldier in chain mail, shield raised, sword ready, rigid watchful stance), and superior composition with the soldier centered and clearly visible at card size. The warm sandstone/ivory tones with golden-hour lighting and long shadows are perfectly executed, and the towering medieval fortifications with concrete ruins in the background create the post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting. V1 has a cape that wasn't requested and feels less focused, while V2 has the soldier positioned awkwardly off-center and lacks the architectural grandeur of the background.

artifacts_found.issue: Red cape not mentioned in prompt; composition less focused with soldier positioned to the side
Soldier positioned off-center and awkwardly; background architecture less imposing and detailed
